notes: Precision weighting (3.61.0) exposed a stand-in choice that misfired: for chart dates BEFORE a strategic-initiative book's first snapshot, the replay stood in the EARLIEST snapshot. On TSLA that meant three years of "history" scored against a day-old migrated strawman the owner had already replaced — 315% tracking error and a 0.6% weight for the frame sitting $17 from the price. Pre-record dates have NO belief to replay; any choice is a stand-in. The stand-in is now the CURRENT book valued as-of those dates — what today's model implies the value WAS (the owner's direction from the start: "calc
